---
title: "Dr. Ömer Sümer"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 17em
  #image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/osuemer
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-sumer/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sumeromer
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h5sbUygAAAAJ&hl=en
---

I am a computer vision and machine learning researcher who works in various
applied topics, including affective computing, digital healthcare, and
biomedical computer vision. Currently, I work as a postdoctoral associate at the
University of Augsburg. 

I like sharing my passion for *learning from data* and regularly write on the
intersection of digital humanities and artificial intelligence (you can find
the English translation of monthly articles that I wrote for
[manifold](https://www.manifold.press/indeks/omer-sumer) under the blog
section). Soon, I will start keeping records of small-scale data analysis and
computer vision/machine learning projects and my notes (under project) 

Aside from work, my hobbies are analog photography, mountains, arts, and
culture. Typically over the weekends, you can find me developing films in the
darkroom, visiting an exhibition, or on a hiking tour crossing borders in the
Alps.

#### Education

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **University of Tübingen**, Germany  
PhD in Computer Science. *August 2017 - March 2021*  
Multimodal Visual Sensing: Automated Estimation of Engagement

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **Istanbul Technical University**, Istanbul, Turkey  
M.Sc. in Electronics Engineering. *July 2012 - September 2014*  

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **Naval Academy**, Istanbul, Turkey  
B.Sc. in Electronics Engineering.  *July 2006 - August 2010*  

#### Experience

* Exploring real-world solutions at the crossroad of computer vision, speech and natural language processing  

* Pioneering methods of artificial intelligence and machine learning to sense and interact with humans  

* Strong experience in data analytics and machine learning operations (MLOps) for given business problems
